column8: I expect Adrian did a lot of revision. (must)Adrian_________________a lot of revision.
column9: I don't believe that Jim stole the money. (can't) Jim______________the money.

column13: I'm sure that Irene wasn't at the party because she was ill. (have) Irene______________at the party because she was ill.
